name: nikxel-windows
author: nikhildhanda04
description: Nikxel — Your Pixel Desktop Companion for Windows

scripts.bundle-renderer: esbuild dist/renderer/index.js --bundle --platform=browser --format=iife --outfile=dist/renderer/index.js --allow-overwrite && rm -rf dist/renderer/engine dist/renderer/input dist/renderer/interaction
scripts.dev: tsc && npm run bundle-renderer && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/style.css dist/renderer/ && cp -r assets dist/ && electron .
scripts.build: tsc && npm run bundle-renderer && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/style.css dist/renderer/ && rm -rf dist/win-* && electron-builder
